category_sources: Official site describes Stylelint as a CSS linter that helps avoid errors and enforce conventions.
source_facts.description says stylelint is a modern CSS linter.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dedicated documentation site with guides and rules.
repo_sources: Official stylelint.io site links to the stylelint/stylelint GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official site and repository topics describe CSS linting, PostCSS, rules, plugins, and conventions.
